query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS campaign_share_links (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  campaignId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  token varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  expiresAt timestamp NULL
);

  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  campaignId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  token varchar(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  expiresAt timestamp NULL
